title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Ninjacart - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Ninjacart - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Ninjacart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Backend Developer at our Varanasi location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ninjacart:
Ninjacart is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ninjacart!
